title: cirsium pubigerum var. glomeratum
intro: Cirsium pubigerum var. glomeratum, also known as the clustered thistle, is a variant of the Cirsium pubigerum plant, a type of thistle native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of consuming Cirsium pubigerum var. glomeratum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a dried flower or root, and can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
